game_id.description: Must match P32 game_id spine exactly.

game_date.description: Game date; must be in 2024 MLB season (2024-03-20 to 2024-10-30).

home_team.description: Home team abbreviation; must match P32 spine.

away_team.description: Away team abbreviation; must match P32 spine.

p_market.description: Market-implied home win probability; derived from odds_decimal. Range [0, 1].

odds_decimal.description: Closing home moneyline in decimal odds format. Must be > 1.0.

sportsbook.description: Name of the sportsbook or archive source.

market_type.description: Odds market type. Only moneyline/h2h is supported.

closing_timestamp.description: Timestamp of closing odds; must be BEFORE game start.

source_odds_ref.description: Reference to original data source (URL or archive name).

license_ref.description: Reference to the approved license record. Must be non-empty.

no_production_ready.rule: No row may be used for live betting or production output.
no_production_ready.enforcement: paper_only=True must be present in pipeline config.

no_outcome_derived_odds.rule: Odds must never be inferred from game outcomes (y_true).
no_outcome_derived_odds.enforcement: Provenance audit must confirm odds source predates game.

no_scraping.rule: Odds must be downloaded manually; scraping is forbidden.

game_id_spine_match.rule: Every game_id in odds import must match a P32 game_id.
game_id_spine_match.enforcement: Left-join on P32 game_identity; no unmatched rows allowed.

closing_before_game_start.rule: closing_timestamp must be before the game start time.
closing_before_game_start.enforcement: Validated by timestamp comparison against P32 game_date.

season_2024_only.rule: Only 2024 MLB season data is permitted.

license_ref_required.rule: Every row must have a non-empty license_ref.
license_ref_required.enforcement: Validated during import; rows without license_ref are rejected.
